---
name: Data Issue
about: Report incorrect, missing, or outdated policy data
title: "[DATA] "
labels: data
assignees: Varnasr
---

## Issue Type
- [ ] Incorrect policy data
- [ ] Missing policy / source
- [ ] Wrong sector classification
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Broken source feed

## Sector
Which sector is affected? (e.g., Health, Education, Agriculture)

## Source URL
Link to the original policy or source.

## Description
What's wrong and what should it be?

## Suggested Correction
If you know the correct information, please share it.
